name: 🎬 视频压缩
description: 分析源文件 → H.265 转码 → 对比压缩效果（码率、体积、质量）
descriptionEn: Analyze source → H.265 transcode → Compare compression ratio, bitrate, quality

steps.label: 分析源文件
steps.task:
# Step 1: Analyze source file
# Edit the filename below to match your input file
INPUT="input.mp4"
ffprobe -v quiet -print_format json -show_format -show_streams "$INPUT"

steps.label: H.265 转码
steps.task:
# Step 2: Transcode to H.265
# Edit these values to match your needs:
INPUT="input.mp4"
CRF=23
PRESET="medium"
AUDIO_BITRATE="128k"
OUTPUT="${INPUT%.*}-compressed.${INPUT##*.}"

ffmpeg -i "$INPUT" -c:v libx265 -crf $CRF -preset $PRESET -c:a aac -b:a $AUDIO_BITRATE -movflags +faststart "$OUTPUT" -y 2>&1 | tail -20
echo ""
echo "Output: $OUTPUT"

steps.label: 对比结果
